<!-- design-phase-complete-586 -->

Phase summary: the convergence cold read (pass 4) originated a finding not seen by any of the three prosecution finder passes. Pass 4 is entries-only / origin-only for the convergence cold read and is not expected to appear as a secondary `also_flagged_by` value on findings originated by passes 1-3.

```yaml
finding_dispositions:
  schema_version: 1
  passes_run: [4]
  entries:
    - finding_id: F1
      pass: 4
      disposition: incorporate
      classification: routine
      disposition_rationale: "The convergence cold read surfaced a cross-lens contradiction not raised by any prosecution finder; incorporated as a documentation clarification."
      artifact_citation: "skills/design-exploration/SKILL.md#design-challenge"
```
